title: Create strava_credentials table migration
description: Create database migration to add strava_credentials table with core identity and token columns
acceptance_criteria: strava_credentials.id: SERIAL PRIMARY KEY
strava_credentials.athlete_id: BIGINT NOT NULL UNIQUE
strava_credentials.access_token: TEXT NOT NULL
strava_credentials.refresh_token: TEXT NOT NULL

title: Add token expiry and sync tracking to strava_credentials
description: Add expires_at, scope, last_synced_at, created_at, updated_at columns to strava_credentials table
acceptance_criteria: strava_credentials.expires_at: TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL
strava_credentials.scope: TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'activity:read_all'
strava_credentials.last_synced_at: TIMESTAMPTZ
strava_credentials.created_at: TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
strava_credentials.updated_at: TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()

title: Create strava_activities table with core activity fields
description: Create database migration to add strava_activities table with identity, athlete reference, and basic activity metadata
acceptance_criteria: strava_activities.id: SERIAL PRIMARY KEY
strava_activities.strava_id: BIGINT NOT NULL UNIQUE
strava_activities.athlete_id: BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES strava_credentials(athlete_id) ON DELETE CASCADE
strava_activities.name: TEXT NOT NULL
strava_activities.sport_type: TEXT NOT NULL
strava_activities.start_date: TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL

title: Add performance metrics to strava_activities
description: Add distance, time, elevation, speed, heart rate, power, and raw data columns to strava_activities table
acceptance_criteria: strava_activities.distance_m: NUMERIC(10,2)
strava_activities.moving_time_s: INTEGER
strava_activities.elapsed_time_s: INTEGER
strava_activities.total_elevation_gain: NUMERIC(8,2)
strava_activities.average_speed_ms: NUMERIC(8,4)
strava_activities.max_speed_ms: NUMERIC(8,4)
strava_activities.average_heartrate: NUMERIC(6,2)
strava_activities.max_heartrate: NUMERIC(6,2)
strava_activities.average_watts: NUMERIC(8,2)
strava_activities.kilojoules: NUMERIC(10,2)
strava_activities.suffer_score: INTEGER
strava_activities.raw_data: JSONB
strava_activities.synced_at: TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()

title: Add Strava environment variables
description: Add STRAVA_CLIENT_ID, STRAVA_CLIENT_SECRET, and STRAVA_REDIRECT_URI to environment configuration and validation
acceptance_criteria: STRAVA_CLIENT_ID is validated as required string in env.ts
STRAVA_CLIENT_SECRET is validated as required string in env.ts
STRAVA_REDIRECT_URI is validated as required string in env.ts
All three variables are documented in .env.example

title: Create Strava tools module with OAuth URL generation
description: Create strava.ts tools module with get_strava_oauth_url function and OAuth state management
acceptance_criteria: get_strava_oauth_url function generates OAuth URL with state token
OAuth state tokens are stored and validated for CSRF protection
Function handles database connection errors gracefully

title: Add activity query and trend analysis functions to Strava tools
description: Add get_strava_activities and get_strava_trends functions with token refresh logic
acceptance_criteria: get_strava_activities function queries database with sport_type and date filters
get_strava_trends function analyzes weekly volume and pace trends
Token refresh logic checks expires_at before API calls
All functions handle database connection errors gracefully

title: Create OAuth callback endpoint structure
description: Add OAuth callback route to bot service with state token validation
acceptance_criteria: OAuth callback endpoint validates state token for CSRF protection
Error handling for invalid authorization codes or expired state tokens
Endpoint accepts authorization code parameter

title: Implement token exchange and credential storage in OAuth callback
description: Exchange authorization code for tokens and store credentials in database
acceptance_criteria: Authorization code is exchanged for access and refresh tokens
Tokens are stored in strava_credentials table with athlete_id
Telegram confirmation message sent with athlete name

title: Implement 90-day activity fetch from Strava API
description: Add function to fetch historical activities from last 90 days using Strava API with pagination
acceptance_criteria: Fetches activities from last 90 days using Strava API
Handles pagination with 30 activities per page
Properly handles API errors and rate limiting

title: Store and confirm initial activity sync
description: Upsert fetched activities into database and send confirmation message
acceptance_criteria: Upserts activities into strava_activities table
Sends Telegram message with count of imported activities
Updates last_synced_at timestamp after successful sync

title: Create Strava sync job function
description: Implement function to sync new Strava activities and refresh tokens
acceptance_criteria: Fetches activities updated since last_synced_at
Checks token expiration before each API call
Refreshes access token using refresh token when expired

title: Register Strava sync job in scheduler
description: Add 30-minute cron job to scheduler.ts that runs the Strava sync function
acceptance_criteria: Cron job runs every 30 minutes
Updates strava_credentials with new tokens and last_synced_at
Properly handles job execution errors

title: Register OAuth and activity query tools in agent
description: Register get_strava_oauth_url and get_strava_activities tools in agent.ts tool definitions
acceptance_criteria: get_strava_oauth_url tool is registered with proper schema
get_strava_activities tool is registered with sport_type and date filters
Tool schemas include required parameters and descriptions

title: Register trend analysis tool and verify agent integration
description: Register get_strava_trends tool and verify agent can call all Strava tools
acceptance_criteria: get_strava_trends tool is registered for trend analysis queries
Agent can successfully call all three Strava tools
Tool integration tests pass

title: Query last 7 days activity summary
description: Modify context.ts to query and format last 7 days Strava activity summary
acceptance_criteria: System prompt includes last 7 days activity count
System prompt includes total moving time for last 7 days
System prompt includes last activity sport and date
Handles case where no activities exist gracefully

title: Format and integrate activity snapshot into agent system prompt
description: Format activity snapshot for agent context and integrate into system prompt
acceptance_criteria: Activity snapshot is formatted for agent context
System prompt properly includes formatted activity data
Agent receives activity context in all planning sessions
